description: Upgrade the security parameters of the legacy encrypted volume located at '/home/ga/Volumes/legacy_project.hc'. currently, this volume uses the SHA-256 hash algorithm and a custom Personal Iterations Multiplier (PIM) of 485. Your task is to update the volume header to use the standard 'HMAC-SHA-512' hash algorithm (PRF) and reset the PIM to the default value (0), while keeping the original password 'UpgradeMe2024' and preserving all data inside. You can perform this using the 'Change Volume Password' feature in the VeraCrypt GUI.
